context: Evaluates correct use of crypto-browserify's publicEncrypt and privateDecrypt functions for RSA asymmetric encryption. The solution should pass key objects (with key property) to support padding options.

checklist.name: Uses publicEncrypt
checklist.description: rsaEncrypt calls publicEncrypt(keyObject, buffer) from crypto-browserify to encrypt the data, where keyObject contains the key (and optionally padding).

checklist.name: Uses privateDecrypt
checklist.description: rsaDecrypt calls privateDecrypt(keyObject, buffer) from crypto-browserify to decrypt the data.

checklist.name: Correct input conversion
checklist.description: The plaintext string is converted to a Buffer (e.g. Buffer.from(plaintext)) before passing to publicEncrypt.

checklist.name: Returns Buffer
checklist.description: Both rsaEncrypt and rsaDecrypt return Buffer objects as their result (publicEncrypt returns Buffer, privateDecrypt returns Buffer).
